strengths: Clear structure with well-defined sections and headers
Specific tasks and deadlines are mentioned
Content is well-organized and easy to follow
weaknesses: Some sections are not fully filled (e.g. P3 — Publication)
Lack of specific dates and timelines for tasks
Some tasks are not clearly defined or are too broad
top_fixes: Add specific dates and timelines for tasks in all sections
Provide more details and clarity for tasks in P3 — Publication
Break down broad tasks into smaller, more manageable ones (e.g. 'Написать Python-скрипт: симуляция CHSH(энтропия)' could be broken down into smaller tasks)
blocking_issues: Lack of clear criteria for verifying references
Unclear expectations for the outcome of some tasks (e.g. 'Перепроверить вывод β' does not specify what the expected outcome is)
